scripts.build:frontend: pnpm run build:api-types && pnpm --filter chatto-frontend build
scripts.check:frontend: pnpm run build:api-types && pnpm --filter chatto-frontend check
scripts.dev:frontend: pnpm run build:api-types && pnpm --filter chatto-frontend dev
scripts.knip:prepare: pnpm --dir apps/frontend run paraglide && pnpm --dir apps/frontend run prepare
scripts.lint:frontend: pnpm run build:api-types && pnpm --filter chatto-frontend lint
scripts.test:frontend: pnpm run build:api-types && pnpm --filter chatto-frontend exec vitest --run
